backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—auto-filling date/time fields and site photos upload/PDF inclusion—to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a pre-generated reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Minimal Tailwind base CSS file defining light and dark OKLCH CSS variable tokens for the shadcn-ui color system including sidebar, chart, and semantic color roles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN, then mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky header, feature submenu banner, the ReportForm, and a footer with a dynamic copyright year and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Main daily field report form component that pre-fills date/time with the current time on every mount, supports multi-image site photo uploads with thumbnail previews, and generates a PDF via pdfGenerator.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark industrial OKLCH color system with safety yellow/orange accents, dark-themed datetime inputs, and btn-primary/secondary/danger/yellow component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Defines a `ReportData` interface and `generatePDF` function that uses jsPDF (loaded via CDN) to produce a formatted letter-sized PDF report with sections for project info, personnel, work details, status, notes, signature, and site photos.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow box shadows, and animations, plus the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Field Report App's project state (version 3), recording two implemented features—auto-filling current date/time on load and a Site Photos upload section—along with their corresponding pending action requests.
